tests.title: the arXiv bundle is cleaned by the REAL arxiv_latex_cleaner — comments, draft commands, unused assets, and dot-files are gone; the cleaner is a required step (no fake-cleaned tarball)
errors: Error: The bundle still carries the "SECRET COMMENT" comment in 1 .tex file(s) — the REAL arxiv_latex_cleaner did not strip the %-comment. Offenders: arxiv-bundle/main.tex.
